market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are solid resistance. Put walls are solid support. Gamma flip acts as a pivot point. Expect mean reversion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected. Dealers are heavily long gamma, which suppresses market movement and pins price to current strikes.
outlook.summary: Market makers hold massive positive GEX, creating a highly stable environment. The underlying bearish sentiment (high PCR and smirk skew) is offset by structural dealer hedging. Expect choppy, mean-reverting price action strictly contained between the 7100 support and the 7240 resistance.

levels.motivazione: Extreme Call OI and Volume across all expiries (0DTE Vol 85k, WEEKLY OI 5.8k, MONTHLY OI 21.9k) creating an absolute ceiling right at the spot price.

Highest 0DTE Call OI (15.4k) acts as the definitive intraday upper boundary. Volatile IV suggests strict dealer defense.
Significant multi-expiry Call OI (0DTE 3.7k, WEEKLY 7.8k, MONTHLY 3.6k) serves as a secondary ceiling above spot.
Weekly Max Pain combined with massive Monthly Call OI (95k) and high Put OI creates strong gravitational pull to the downside.
0DTE Gamma Flip level. Spot trading well above this confirms dealer long gamma positioning and stabilizing dynamic hedging.
0DTE Max Pain level situated between the Gamma Flip and current spot, acting as an intraday mean-reversion target.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected. Strongly positive GEX across all expiries suppresses volatility and pins price.
outlook.summary: Market is characterized by massive positive GEX (2.13B in 0DTE alone) indicating dealers are heavily long gamma. This environment suppresses volatility and favors mean-reversion strategies. Spot is gravitating towards the 0DTE Max Pain at 26590. Major resistance is clustered at 27100-27500, while structural supports lie at 26500 and 26000.

levels.motivazione: Heavy Call OI and volume across 0DTE (91 OI), WEEKLY (115 OI), and MONTHLY (544 OI). Ultimate resistance.
Massive Call volume in 0DTE (2898 Vol) combined with consistent OI across WEEKLY (70 OI) and MONTHLY (51 OI).
Significant Put OI in 0DTE (149 OI), WEEKLY (113 OI), and MONTHLY (48 OI). Major structural floor.
Huge structural Call OI in MONTHLY (3784 OI) backed by WEEKLY (109 OI). Acts as a magnet and support.
0DTE Max Pain level where option value is minimized. Strong magnetic pull expected into the close.
Extreme intraday Call volume (1208 Vol) with 94 OI. Immediate resistance above spot.
High Put volume in 0DTE (555 Vol) with WEEKLY (87 Call OI) and MONTHLY OI acting as a friction level.
Notable Put volume in 0DTE (312 Vol) providing a secondary defense line for market makers.
